name: e-Shram Portal
benefit: UAN card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance under PMSBY, access to social security schemes
application_steps: Visit eshram.gov.in or nearest CSC
Self-register with Aadhaar and mobile OTP
Fill occupation and bank details
Download UAN (Universal Account Number) e-Shram card instantly

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM / Aajeevika)
benefit: Revolving fund ₹15,000/SHG, CIF capital subsidy, bank linkage, skill & placement support

eligibility.group_size: 10–20 members form a Self Help Group

application_steps: Contact nearest NRLM resource person / Gram Panchayat
Women form Self Help Group (SHG) of 10–20 members
SHG registered and bank account opened
Revolving fund ₹15,000 credited after 3-month track record
Capital fund and bank linkage provided subsequently

name: Namami Gange Programme
benefit: Sewage treatment, ghats/crematoria development, rural sanitation, biodiversity conservation along Ganga

eligibility.target: Communities, ULBs, Gram Panchayats on Ganga river basin
eligibility.note: Infrastructure/environmental scheme; benefits flow to communities automatically

application_steps: Communities / ULBs apply for Namami Gange projects through NMCG
Proposals submitted at nmcg.nic.in
Citizens report pollution incidents via Namami Gange app

name: BharatNet
benefit: High-speed broadband connectivity to all Gram Panchayats; affordable internet access

eligibility.beneficiaries: Rural citizens, government institutions, schools, health centres
eligibility.note: Infrastructure scheme; individual access via installed wifi hotspots at GP

application_steps: BharatNet hotspot installed by BSNL at Gram Panchayat office
Citizens connect via wifi using voucher or OTP-based login
Services available at Gram Panchayat / CSC level

name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme
benefit: Incentives of 4–20% on incremental sales from base year for 5 years across 14 sectors

conditions: Minimum investment thresholds vary by sector
Incremental sales above base year required

application_steps: Apply through respective sector ministry portal
Submit investment plan and financial details
Ministry reviews and issues approval
Incentive disbursed annually based on incremental sales

name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
benefit: Subsidised seeds, fertilisers, farm equipment; demonstrations and training for rice, wheat, pulses, oilseeds

eligibility.target: Farmers in selected districts growing target crops

application_steps: Contact District Agriculture Office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra
Register as NFSM beneficiary with land records
Receive subsidised inputs (seeds, fertiliser, tools)
Participate in farm demonstrations and training

name: Rashtriya Gokul Mission
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefit: Genetic upgradation of indigenous cattle, artificial insemination services, breed improvement support
application_steps: Contact State Animal Husbandry Department
Register with nearest Gokul Gram or progressive farmer network
Avail free or subsidised artificial insemination services
Access breed improvement and veterinary support

name: White Revolution – National Programme for Dairy Development (NPDD)
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefit: Milk processing infrastructure, cold chain, cooperative strengthening; milk yield enhancement

eligibility.target: Dairy cooperatives, milk unions, farmer producer organisations, dairy farmers

application_steps: Join nearest dairy cooperative society
Cooperative applies for NPDD funding to NDDB / state agency
Benefits flow through cooperative to member farmers

name: Blue Revolution – Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefit: Subsidy 40–60% for fisheries infrastructure; fish hatcheries, aquaculture, boats, cold storage, processing units
application_steps: Apply at pmmsy.dof.gov.in or nearest Fisheries Department
Submit project proposal with cost estimates
Approval by state fisheries department
Subsidy released in instalments upon project completion

name: AMRUT (Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit: Water supply, sewerage, storm water drains, green spaces, and urban transport in cities

eligibility.target: Citizens in AMRUT cities (500 selected cities with population > 1 lakh)
eligibility.note: Government infrastructure scheme; no individual application required

application_steps: ULBs prepare Service Level Improvement Plans (SLIP)
State Annual Action Plans submitted to MoHUA
Projects sanctioned and implemented by ULB
Citizens benefit through improved infrastructure

name: Smart Cities Mission
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit: Smart infrastructure, digital services, integrated command centres, improved urban services in 100 smart cities

eligibility.note: Infrastructure scheme; residents benefit automatically from improved city services

application_steps: Cities compete and get selected under Smart Cities Mission
Smart City SPV implements projects
Citizens access smart services (digital payments, smart parking, integrated apps)

name: Saansad Adarsh Gram Yojana (SAGY)
benefit: Holistic development of identified villages: infrastructure, livelihood, education, health

eligibility.target: Residents of Gram Panchayats adopted by Members of Parliament
eligibility.note: Village adopted by MP; residents benefit automatically through convergence of schemes

application_steps: MP identifies and adopts a Gram Panchayat
Village Development Plan prepared with community participation
Existing government schemes converged for the village
Residents access all schemes through village Panchayat

name: One Nation One Subscription (ONOS)
benefit: Access to 13,000+ international journals for all government higher education and research institutions

eligibility.target: Students and faculty/researchers in government higher education institutions
eligibility.institutions: All central/state government colleges, universities, research institutions
eligibility.note: Access through institutional login; no individual registration required

application_steps: Institution enrolls in ONOS through INFLIBNET
Students/faculty access journals via institutional IP or VPN
No individual cost to students

name: Divyang Kaushal Yojana (National Action for Mechanised Sanitation Ecosystem)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit: Free skill training and certification for persons with disabilities; placement assistance
application_steps: Visit nearest PMKVY or NSDC training centre with PwD facility
Submit disability certificate and Aadhaar
Enrol in preferred accessible skill course
Complete training and appear for sector skill council assessment
Receive NSQF certificate and placement support

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit: Government shares 25% of stipend (max ₹1,500/month) with employer; NATS provides apprenticeship stipend directly

eligibility.education: Minimum 5th standard pass; qualification varies by trade

application_steps: Register at apprenticeshipindia.org or nats.education.gov.in
Search for apprenticeship opportunities by trade and location
Apply to employer; employer engages apprentice
Stipend received monthly; certificate issued on completion

name: National Means cum Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMSS)
benefit: ₹12,000 per year scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker sections

eligibility.class: Students in Class 8 (selection) continuing to Class 12
eligibility.exam: Must qualify National Means cum Merit Scholarship Exam (NMMS Exam) in Class 8
eligibility.minimum_marks: At least 55% in Class 7 (50% for SC/ST)

application_steps: Appear for NMMS Exam in Class 8 (conducted by state)
Apply at scholarships.gov.in after qualifying
Submit income certificate, marksheets, bank details
Scholarship renewed annually on maintaining 55% marks

name: Atal Innovation Mission (AIM) / Atal Tinkering Labs
benefit: ₹20 lakh grant for Atal Tinkering Labs in schools; startup incubation support via Atal Incubation Centres

ATL.condition: Must have dedicated space for lab and STEM experiments

AIC.target: Academic institutions / NGOs / companies setting up incubators

application_steps: Schools apply at aim.gov.in for ATL grant
Submit application with CBSE registration and space details
AIM evaluates and approves (grant of ₹20 lakh over 5 years)
Lab set up with equipment for robotics, IoT, 3D printing etc.

name: Green Revolution – RAFTAAR (Bringing Green Revolution to Eastern India)
benefit: Subsidised seeds, fertilisers, modern farm equipment; cluster demonstrations; irrigation support

eligibility.target: Farmers in eastern India states (WB, Odisha, Bihar, Jharkhand, Eastern UP, Chhattisgarh, Assam)

application_steps: Contact District Agriculture Office
Register as beneficiary with land and Aadhaar details
Receive subsidised inputs and participate in demonstrations

name: Reservoir Development Scheme (PMMSY – Inland Fisheries)
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefit: Development of reservoirs for inland fishery; cage culture support; subsidy for fishermen

eligibility.target: Inland fishermen, fish farmers using reservoirs/ponds/lakes

application_steps: Apply at state Fisheries Department or pmmsy.dof.gov.in
Submit lease documents and project proposal
Approval and subsidy disbursed post implementation

name: SHE-Marts (Self Help Group Empowerment Market)
benefit: Physical and digital marketplace for SHG products; marketing and branding support

eligibility.target: Women Self Help Groups (SHGs) under NRLM/DAY-NRLM
eligibility.condition: SHG must be active member of NRLM/Aajeevika programme

application_steps: Active NRLM SHG registers product details with State Rural Livelihood Mission
Products listed on national and state SHE-Mart platforms
SHG products sold through government e-marketplace and physical marts

name: Bharat VISTAAR (Village & Integrated Space Technology for Agri-Rural growth)
benefit: Digital agriculture services, AI/satellite-based crop advisory, soil health, weather alerts via village-level kiosks
application_steps: Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra or Agriculture department
Register mobile number for crop advisory alerts
Access digital agri services through village kiosk or app

name: PM Poshan Shakti Nirman (Mid-Day Meal Scheme)
benefit: Free hot cooked meals to school children; ≥450 calories and 12g protein (primary), ≥700 cal & 20g protein (upper primary)

eligibility.target: Students enrolled in Classes 1–8 in government and government-aided schools

application_steps: Automatic benefit for all enrolled students in government / aided schools
No separate application required
Meals served on all school working days

name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit: AIIMS-like institutions and upgradation of existing govt medical colleges in underserved states

eligibility.target: Citizens in states with inadequate tertiary healthcare (primarily underserved states)
eligibility.note: Infrastructure scheme; patients access improved healthcare at upgraded government hospitals

application_steps: Citizens access healthcare at newly set-up AIIMS or upgraded medical colleges
OPD and IPD services at government rates
No individual application required

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare / Jal Shakti
benefit: 55% subsidy (45% for general) on drip/sprinkler irrigation; 'Har Khet Ko Pani' – water to every farm

sub_scheme_PDMC.name: Per Drop More Crop
conditions: Farmer must own or lease agricultural land
Minimum specified land area for application

application_steps: Apply at State Agriculture Department or pmksy.gov.in
Submit land records and drip/sprinkler installation estimate
Approval and physical verification by agriculture officer
Subsidy credited to bank account post installation

name: Kala Sanskriti Vikas Yojana
benefit: Financial assistance for performing arts, craft development, cultural heritage promotion and events

conditions: Registered cultural organisation or recognised artist

application_steps: Apply online at indiaculture.gov.in
Submit application with portfolio and project proposal
Ministry committee review and approval
Grant disbursed to bank account

name: Ayushman Bharat – AB PM-JAY for 70+ Senior Citizens
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit: Health coverage ₹5 lakh/year per individual for all senior citizens aged 70+; includes existing PMJAY beneficiaries
application_steps: Visit pmjay.gov.in or nearest Ayushman Mitra / CSC
Submit Aadhaar and age proof
Ayushman Vaya Vandana Card issued
Use card at any empanelled hospital for cashless treatment
